message:
feat(freeze): implement set_proto opcode and block-level interpreter fallback

- Fix is_undefined_or_null to replace value in place (n_pop=1, n_push=1)
- Implement set_proto opcode via js_frozen_set_proto QuickJS helper
- Add js_frozen_exec_opcode for executing single unsupported opcodes via interpreter
- Block-level fallback: unsupported opcodes call interpreter then continue with frozen code
- No function-level skip: all functions can now be frozen with interpreter fallback for edge cases

Lodash: 67/67, Zod: 43/43, RxJS: all pass
